blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter; London's title decider looms on Sunday

Bodo/Glimt pulled off one of Norwegian football's finest European nights — winning 2-1 at Internazionale on Tuesday. Arsenal (61pts) now face Chelsea at the Emirates on Sunday in the Premier League's biggest fixture of the season.
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Villarreal at Barcelona, La Liga title race on the line
